name: Wren
staticStory: Wren has sweet red yarn pigtails and a beautiful blue muslin dress with little wood buttons. She loves cuddles, tea parties, and story time more than anything — she always saves the coziest spot on the picnic blanket for her best friend.

name: Paloma
staticStory: Paloma wears a teal muslin romper with a matching headband over her soft knit ponytail. She is the kindest friend in the park — she loves sharing, taking turns, and making sure nobody is ever left out of the game.

name: Luke
staticStory: Luke wears his favorite marine-blue T-shirt and shorts, ready for the playground. He is everyone's most helpful friend — first to hold the ladder on the slide, first to pick you up when you tumble, and always ready for one more game of tag.

name: Gwen
staticStory: Gwen has tactile knit pigtails and hand-painted rosy cheeks, and she is always humming something. She loves music with her whole heart — she sings to the birds in the park and makes up little songs about everything she sees.

name: Levi
staticStory: Levi wears a soft sage T-shirt and shorts, usually with a little sand still in his pockets. He is the park's master builder — sandcastles with towers and moats and secret doors — and he never minds starting over when the tide comes in.

name: Alex
staticStory: Alex wears sturdy organic cotton overalls, perfect for climbing and exploring. He is endlessly curious about the outdoors — every leaf, ladybug, and puddle is a discovery, and his favorite question is 'I wonder what's over there?'

name: Grady
staticStory: Grady wears a warm caramel outfit as soft as his heart. He is the friend who notices when someone is sad and knows just how to cheer them up — a silly face, a shared snack, or the world's most patient hug.

name: Mia
staticStory: Mia twirls in her dusty rose dress with knit jersey pigtails that bounce when she laughs. She is the most playful friend in the park — she adores surprises, hide-and-seek, and giggling until her painted cheeks turn even rosier.

name: Chloe
staticStory: Chloe has sweet blonde fabric pigtails and a dusty rose muslin romper with charming ruffles. She is a natural nurturer — she tucks in every stuffed animal at bedtime, hums lullabies, and believes everyone sleeps better with a friend close by.
